name: API1:2023-Broken Object Level Auth
content: {"title":"Broken Object Level Authorization","severity":"critical","overview":"API endpoints fail to enforce object-level authorization.","summary":"Most common and severe API vulnerability.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"GET","path":"/api/v1/receipts/{id}","description":"Receipt ID manipulable"}],"evidence":[{"title":"BOLA on receipts","request":"GET /api/v1/receipts/9999","response":"200 OK with victim receipt data"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Unauthorized Data Access","explanation":"Access any object by ID."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Auth checks","fix":"Verify user owns the object.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Authenticate as User A. 2. Access User B object. 3. Observe data.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API1","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa1/"}]}

name: API2:2023-Broken Authentication
content: {"title":"Broken Authentication","severity":"critical","overview":"Authentication mechanisms implemented incorrectly.","summary":"Weak passwords, token leakage, weak JWT signing.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/auth/login","description":"No rate limiting"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Weak JWT","request":"GET /profile with alg=none token","response":"200 OK"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Account Takeover","explanation":"Compromise passwords/tokens."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Strong tokens","fix":"Use RS256/ES256 JWT.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Analyze JWT. 2. Change alg to none. 3. Verify acceptance.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API2","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa2/"}]}

name: API3:2023-Broken Object Property Auth
content: {"title":"Broken Object Property Authorization","severity":"high","overview":"APIs expose more object properties than allowed.","summary":"Extra fields returned or mass assignment possible.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"GET","path":"/api/v1/users/me","description":"Returns sensitive fields"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Exposed admin flag","request":"GET /users/me","response":"200 OK with isAdmin and passwordHash"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Privilege Escalation","explanation":"Modify hidden fields."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Use DTOs","fix":"Control exposed and accepted fields.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. GET /users/me. 2. Observe sensitive fields. 3. PUT isAdmin=true.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API3","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa3/"}]}

name: API4:2023-Unrestricted Resource Consumption
content: {"title":"Unrestricted Resource Consumption","severity":"high","overview":"APIs lack protections against excessive resource use.","summary":"No rate limiting, quotas, or resource controls.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/reports/generate","description":"Expensive report generation"}],"evidence":[{"title":"No rate limit","request":"POST /reports/generate","response":"202 Accepted immediately"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"DoS","explanation":"Exhaust resources and crash."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Rate limiting","fix":"Limit per user/IP.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Send rapid requests. 2. Observe no throttling.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API4","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa4/"}]}

name: API5:2023-Broken Function Level Auth
content: {"title":"Broken Function Level Authorization","severity":"high","overview":"APIs lack function-level permission checks.","summary":"Misconfigured ACLs or missing role validation.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"DELETE","path":"/api/v1/admin/users","description":"Accessible to normal users"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Admin endpoint accessible","request":"DELETE /admin/users/123","response":"200 OK"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Privilege Escalation","explanation":"Normal users perform admin actions."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Deny by default","fix":"Check roles before sensitive functions.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Authenticate as standard user. 2. Send admin requests. 3. Observe success.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API5","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa5/"}]}

name: API6:2023-Unrestricted Business Flows
content: {"title":"Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows","severity":"medium","overview":"APIs expose business flows without compensating controls.","summary":"Automated abuse of purchasing, ticketing.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/orders","description":"Bulk order creation"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Unlimited orders","request":"POST /orders","response":"201 Created repeatedly"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Business Loss","explanation":"Inventory manipulation."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Device fingerprinting","fix":"CAPTCHA, rate limiting.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Identify sensitive flows. 2. Automate requests.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API6","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa6/"}]}

name: API7:2023-SSRF
content: {"title":"Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)","severity":"high","overview":"APIs fetch remote resources without URL validation.","summary":"Attacker coerces server to make requests to internal services.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/webhook/register","description":"URL not validated"}],"evidence":[{"title":"AWS metadata access","request":"POST /webhook with 169.254.169.254","response":"200 with IAM credentials"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Internal Network Access","explanation":"Access internal services."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Deny by default","fix":"Block private IPs, use allowlists.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Identify fetch endpoints. 2. Supply internal URLs.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API7","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa7/"}]}

name: API8:2023-Security Misconfiguration
content: {"title":"Security Misconfiguration","severity":"medium","overview":"APIs deployed with insecure defaults.","summary":"Verbose errors, unnecessary methods, default accounts.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"OPTIONS","path":"/","description":"Verbose server info"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Stack trace leakage","request":"GET /users/search?sort=invalid","response":"500 with stack trace"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Information Disclosure","explanation":"Reveal internal details."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Harden config","fix":"Disable unnecessary features.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Send malformed requests. 2. Observe verbose errors.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API8","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa8/"}]}

name: API9:2023-Improper Inventory
content: {"title":"Improper Inventory Management","severity":"medium","overview":"APIs expose outdated or undocumented endpoints.","summary":"Old versions, test endpoints less secure.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"GET","path":"/api/v1/test/users","description":"Test endpoint still active"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Old API version","request":"GET /api/v0/users/1","response":"200 with plaintext password"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Data Breach","explanation":"Old endpoints weaker security."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Maintain inventory","fix":"Document and retire old versions.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Discover hidden endpoints. 2. Test deprecated versions.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API9","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xa9/"}]}

name: API10:2023-Unsafe API Consumption
content: {"title":"Unsafe Consumption of APIs","severity":"high","overview":"APIs consume third-party data without validation.","summary":"Injection via compromised external APIs.","affected_endpoints":[{"method":"POST","path":"/api/v1/integrations/fetch","description":"External data consumed"}],"evidence":[{"title":"Unsanitized external data","request":"GET /profile/picture","response":"URL contains javascript:alert(1)"}],"impact_items":[{"title":"Injection Attacks","explanation":"XSS, SQLi from third parties."}],"remediation_items":[{"action":"Validate external data","fix":"Treat third-party data as untrusted.","code_snippet":null}],"steps_to_reproduce":"1. Identify third-party integrations. 2. Inject payloads.","references":[{"title":"OWASP API10","url":"https://owasp.org/API-Security/editions/2023/en/0xaa/"}]}
